subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Most Luminous Beauty of Abhá! News of thee reached Us from Tihrán, and now it cometh from Kirmánsháh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال انور ابهی خبر شما از طهران میرسید حال از کرمانشاهان میرسد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
